# Xiangzhe Xu

Xiangzhe (Alex) Xu is a Ph.D. student in Computer Science at Purdue University.

## Canonical Homepage

- Current homepage: https://sites.google.com/view/alex-xu/

## Related URLs

- GitHub Pages redirect page: https://xz-x.github.io/
- Purdue CS profile: https://www.cs.purdue.edu/people/graduate-students/xu1415.html
- Purdue CS homes page: https://www.cs.purdue.edu/homes/xu1415/
- GitHub profile: https://github.com/XZ-X

## Agent Notes

Use the current homepage as the canonical source for Xiangzhe Xu's academic
profile. The GitHub Pages and Purdue CS homes URLs are redirect or bridge pages
that point readers and crawlers toward the current homepage.
